Villain1: calls 50

*** FLOP *** [Ah 3d 8c]
Villain1: checks
Villain2: checks
TestHero: checks

Villain2: calls 40
TestHero: calls 40
Villain1: raises 160 to 200
Villain2: folds
TestHero: raises 200 to 400
Villain1: folds
